STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL (MNPI) — Project Kelapa — Embargo until 15 July 2026 09:00 WIB; internal use only, not for public disclosure.
Parties: PT Kreasipay Teknologi Nusantara (an Indonesian fintech issuer listed on Bursa Efek Mentari) to acquire 60% of PT Lumbung Dana Selaras (digital lending platform).
Consideration: IDR 480,000,000,000 cash and scrip mix; implied equity value approx IDR 800,000,000,000; per‑share price reference IDR 650.
Financing: concurrent private placement of new shares (approx 8% post‑issue) to PT Aurora Capital Persada under a Share Subscription Agreement, raising IDR 260,000,000,000 at IDR 650 per share.
Definitive documents: Perjanjian Jual Beli Saham (SPA), Perjanjian Pemegang Saham (SHA), and Transitional Services Agreement to be executed by 30 June 2026, subject to confirmatory due diligence.
Conditions precedent: RUPS Luar Biasa approval; prior permit from Otoritas Jasa Nusantara (OJN) for change of control and fit‑and‑proper of new commissioners; confirmation of target’s platform license continuity.
Keterbukaan informasi: issuer to file disclosure to BEM and OJN within 2 business days post‑RUPS in accordance with Peraturan OJN No. 12/2024; Investor Relations Q&A draft to be prepared and held under embargo.
MAC/MAE: “Material Adverse Effect” means any event causing a 20% or more decline in consolidated net revenue or revocation/suspension of the target’s lending authorization; no MAE shall be deemed to occur due solely to general economic changes, interest rate movements, or pandemics disclosed prior to Signing, and the parties acknowledge that as of today no MAE has occurred.
Earn‑out and retention: up to additional 10% stake payable in shares if 18‑month GMV and NPL metrics are met; key employees to enter 24‑month retention and non‑compete agreements with customary termination and kompensasi.
Governance: acquirer to nominate 3 of 5 directors and 2 of 3 commissioners; reserved matters list to include budget approvals, capital expenditures > IDR 50,000,000,000, and new product launches.
Closing timetable: Signing targeted by 30 June 2026; Closing within 90 days thereafter or 15 days after all OJN/BEM approvals, whichever is later; long‑stop date 31 December 2026.
Public‑source reference: per Asosiasi Fintek Nusantara (2025 public report), national digital lending penetration is ~18%; this contextual data is non‑issuer‑specific and is not MNPI.
todo: update cap table once hr confirms option cancellations; marketing suggests a team spa day after closing if budgets allow.
Contact: Bpk. Ardi Pranoto, CFO, PT Kreasipay Teknologi Nusantara — ir@kreasipay.id.test; this non‑binding term sheet is for internal board memo workflow and is not an offer to sell securities.
